prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该校在甘肃省最低录取位次分别为：2021年约10223名（理科）、2022年约11489名（理科）、2023年约9207名（理科）、2024年约8615名（物理类） 、2025年约11675名（物理类）。整体呈波动走势，2023–2024年位次明显前移，但2025年大幅后移至11675名，较2024年后移约3060名，波动幅度较大。2025年基准位次为11675名；该校在甘肃省理科/物理类招生计划：2021–2023年均为41人，2024–2025年增至43人，2026年计划44人，较2025年增加1人，扩幅约2.3%。 小幅扩招对竞争压力略有缓解，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 太原理工大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名持续上升：2021年第113名→2023年第107名→2025年 第103名→2026年第97名，排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力和声誉持续增强，对考生吸引力有所提升；2022年高考周期内声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学校管理 争议（郑强书记管理受学生批评），但近年无重大负面舆情事件。抖音热度排名第63位，评价为"一般"，综合热度约48.9万，短视频平台曝光量处于中等水平，未出现高热关注信 号。投档异常文件中未收录该校断档记录，说明近年录取走势相对平稳；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科。该校招生专业 中化学工程与工艺、材料科学与工程、安全工程、测绘工程等与化工、材料、安全学科关联密切，但化工/材料大类社会热度偏低（明显劝退），电气工程、电子信息、计算机类 等热门专业虽无A级学科支撑，但社会热度较高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信、计算机类等专业2024年社会热度均为"高热推荐"或"推荐"，报考 热度持续走高；而化学工程与工艺、材料科学与工程等属生化环材大类，社会评价为"明显劝退"。甘肃省2026年高考总人数约21.87万，较2025年增长约21.6%；按近年物理类占比 约67.5%估算，2026年物理类考生约14.76万人，较2025年12.14万人增加约2.6万人，竞争明显加剧。省控线数据：2025年物理类本科批374分；太原理工大学位于山西省（非甘肃本省），属于跨省招生。该校在甘肃的招生人数占其全国总招生比例较小（2024年约0.9%），属于外省招生中的中等规模 。山西与甘肃地理相近，地域偏好无明显偏向。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的走势、2026年招生计划仅小幅扩招2.3%、甘肃省物理类考生预计增加约21.5%导致竞 争显著加剧，以及学校软科排名持续上升带来的正面吸引力，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准11675名基础上继续后移。经综合权衡，预测最低位次约11888名，区间11388– 12388名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约11888名，区间11388–12388名。位次在区间下限（11388名）以内可重点冲刺一档热门专业（电气、电子、集成电路等）；位次在区间中段（约11888名）建议以二档 专业为主、一档适当冲刺；位次接近区间上限（12388名）建议以三档专业保底为主，兼顾二档中位次要求较低的专业。该校化学工程与技术为A-优势学科，但化工类专业社会热 度偏低，报考时需结合个人兴趣与就业预期综合判断。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for this university in Gansu Province were: approximately 10223 (Science) in 2021, approximately 11489 (Science) in 2022, approximately 9207 (Science) in 2023, approximately 8615 (Physics Category) in 2024, and approximately 11675 (Physics Category) in 2025. The overall trend shows fluctuations, with rankings moving significantly forward in 2023–2024, but then dropping sharply to 11675 in 2025, a backward shift of about 3060 places compared to 2024, indicating considerable volatility. The baseline ranking for 2025 is 11675; the university's enrollment plan for Science/Physics Category in Gansu Province: 41 students each year from 2021 to 2023, increasing to 43 students in 2024–2025, and planned 44 students in 2026, an increase of 1 student compared to 2025, an expansion of about 2.3%. The slight expansion provides some relief to competition pressure, but the effect is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Taiyuan University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising: 113th in 2021 → 107th in 2023 → 103rd in 2025 → 97th in 2026, reflecting continuous improvement in comprehensive strength and reputation, enhancing its appeal to candidates; during the 2022 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly involving school management controversies (criticism of Secretary Zheng Qiang's management by students), but there have been no major negative public incidents in recent years. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 63rd, with an evaluation of "average," and a comprehensive popularity of about 489,000, indicating moderate exposure on short video platforms without signs of high attention. The abnormal filing records do not include any instances of admission cut-off drops for this university, suggesting relatively stable admission trends in recent years; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at this university. The university's admission majors include Chemical Engineering and Process, Materials Science and Engineering, Safety Engineering, Surveying and Mapping Engineering, etc., which are closely related to chemical engineering, materials, and safety disciplines. However, the social popularity of the chemical engineering/materials categories is relatively low (clearly discouraged), while popular majors such as Electrical Engineering, Electronic Information, and Computer Science, although lacking A-level discipline support, have high social popularity.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication, and Computer Science had social popularity ratings of "highly recommended" or "recommended" in 2024, with application enthusiasm continuing to rise; while Chemical Engineering and Process, Materials Science and Engineering, etc., belong to the biology, chemistry, environment, and materials categories, with social evaluations of "clearly discouraged." The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Gansu Province is approximately 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025; based on the recent proportion of Physics Category candidates at about 67.5%, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in 2026 is about 147,600, an increase of about 26,000 compared to 121,400 in 2025, indicating significantly intensified competition. Provincial control line data: the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch score is 374 points; Taiyuan University of Technology is located in Shanxi Province (not within Gansu Province), so it is a cross-provincial enrollment. The number of students enrolled by this university in Gansu accounts for a small proportion of its total national enrollment (about 0.9% in 2024), representing a medium scale among out-of-province enrollments. Shanxi and Gansu are geographically close, with no obvious regional preference bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan by only 2.3%, the expected increase of about 21.5% in Physics Category candidates in Gansu Province leading to notably intensified competition, and the positive appeal from the university's rising Soft Science ranking, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 11675. After comprehensive weighing, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 11888, with a range of 11388–12388.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is approximately 11888, with a range of 11388–12388. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (11388) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors (Electrical, Electronics, Integrated Circuits, etc.); those with rankings in the middle of the range (approximately 11888) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors with some sprint attempts for Tier 1; candidates with rankings near the upper limit (12388) are advised to mainly use Tier 3 majors as safety options, while also considering Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements. The university's Chemical Engineering and Technology is an A- advantageous discipline, but the social popularity of chemical engineering majors is relatively low; applicants should consider personal interests and employment expectations comprehensively when applying.
